headline: ISRG's Rising Procedure TAM With Low Penetration Backs Sustained Growth
summary: ISRG expects its addressable procedures to reach 9 million by 2026, pointing to a significant growth runway as robotic surgery adoption remains nascent.

headline: Intuitive Surgical Is Jumping 2.7% Ahead of Earnings. Is the Robotics Stock Ready to Recover?
summary: Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ:ISRG) reports Q1 2026 results on April 21 after the bell. However, is stock is rising 2.7% today. Yet, with the stock down 16.92% year-to-date and trading well below its post-Q4 price, this is a quarter where execution has to speak louder than narrative. A Strong 2025 That the Market Has Already Discounted ... Intuitive Surgical Is Jumping 2.7% Ahead of Earnings. Is the Robotics Stock Ready to Recover?
